title: redstono's troll mod
description: Redstono’s Troll Mod adds sneaky prank tools to Minecraft, including the mischievous "Uv Been Trolled" item and a set of deceptive fake blocks—fake dirt, stone, and oak logs. These look like the real thing but act nothing like it, perfect for trolling
body:
What’s Inside
- Uv Been Trolled Item
A prank object with unexpected effects-use it to deliver instant regret and laughter.
- Fake Dirt, Fake Stone, Fake Oak Log
Blocks that look real but aren’t. Dig one and explode. Perfect for unsuspecting players. >:)


I recommend that you send this mod to other poeple in modpacks, so they don't notice the mod, until its too late.




anybody can use this mod in any modpack
